name: NostrSocial
summary: Social awareness for AI entities — contacts, trust tiers, and identity verification over Nostr

env.name: NOSTR_NSEC
env.description: Nostr private key (nsec) for the entity's identity. Load via NostrKey — never hardcode.

env.name: NOSTR_RELAY
env.description: Preferred Nostr relay URL for publishing contact events and verification challenges.

env.name: NOSTRKEY_PASSPHRASE
env.description: Passphrase for decrypting a NostrKey identity file, if using encrypted storage.
